/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/chronos_core.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libchronos_core.so -o libchronos_core.so CMakeFiles/chronos_core.dir/src/codex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chronos_core.dir/src/simhash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chronos_core.dir/src/ppr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chronos_core.dir/src/vector_index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chronos_core.dir/src/ast_indexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chronos_core.dir/src/ipc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chronos_core.dir/src/context_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chronos_core.dir/src/oracle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chronos_core.dir/src/mmr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chronos_core.dir/src/rrf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chronos_core.dir/src/git_indexer.cpp.o   -L/home/zer0/.local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zer0/CHRONO/build/_deps/libgit2-build:/home/zer0/.local/lib -lsqlite3 _deps/libgit2-build/libgit2.so.1.8.1 /usr/lib/libtree-sitter.so -ltree-sitter-cpp /usr/lib/libtree-sitter.so -ltree-sitter-python -ltree-sitter-cpp -ltree-sitter-python /usr/lib/libpcre.so /usr/lib/libz.so -lrt
